title: Moonlit Smile
description: Your smile makes the world softer.

title: Pocket Laugh
description: Your laugh is one of my favorite sounds.

title: Tiny Sunday Magic
description: You make simple moments feel special.

title: Soft Bloom Heart
description: You are beautiful in ways words cannot fully explain.

title: Gentle Hands
description: I love how you care.

title: Little Habit Charm
description: I love your cute little habits.

title: Quiet Harbor
description: I love the way you make me feel calm.

title: Brave Little Light
description: I am proud of the person you are becoming.

title: Velvet Promise
description: You deserve to be loved gently and fully.

title: Lucky Constellation
description: I am lucky to know you.

title: Better Day Lantern
description: You make my days better.

title: Favorite Memory Leaf
description: You are my favorite part of many memories.

title: Wish in Pink Clouds
description: I hope this year gives you more reasons to smile.

title: Dreamcatcher Glow
description: I hope your dreams get closer.

title: Today Loves You
description: I hope you feel loved today.

title: Never Forget Spark
description: I hope you never forget how special you are.

title: Thank-You Petal
description: Thank you for being you.

title: Stayed Beside Me
description: Thank you for staying.

title: Sugarlight Trail
description: Thank you for making life sweeter.

title: Tomorrow's Keepsake
description: I want to keep making memories with you.

title: Many Candles Ahead
description: I hope I can be part of many more birthdays.

title: The Hidden Birthday Sun
description: You are the birthday star.
